caption:
One of the easiest ways to rent in London with Blueground ✨ 

I recently stayed in a @bluegroundhomes apartment in East London and loved how seamless everything was. My favourite part was the flat’s modern and comfortable design 🏡

Some of the benefits include:
👛No deposits & flexible stays from 1 month (or shorter) to 2 years
🛋️Fully furnished with Wi-Fi & workspace
📱Easy app-based management
✨Consistent quality & service
🏙️Gyms, pools & parking in select buildings

🌍50,000+ apartments in 4,000+ cities, making it easy to live like a local in some of the best destinations
💡 For 1-year+ leases you can enjoy great rates and the flexibility to move between apartments, neighbourhoods, or cities

🎁 Special offer: Use code BGJOURNEY via the link in bio🔗 to get $15 off bookings under 1 month, $75 off bookings under 6 months, and $100 off stays of 6 months or longer
*also valid for bookings abroad
